understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by navigating a grid and activating then stepping onto goal cells. Each goal cell requires your carried piece to have a specific shape, color, and rotation simultaneously. You must strategically use modifier tiles (shape, color, and rotation changers) to align your piece's attributes with each goal's requirements, then reach the goal cell before running out of stamina and lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game operates on a grid with tile types: walls (impassable), floors (walkable), and special tiles (shape, color, rotation changers, stamina refills). Each move costs 1 stamina; when stamina reaches 0, a life is lost and stamina resets to its maximum. Losing all lives results in game over. Shape changers cycle the piece through shapes 0–5; color changers cycle through orange, blue, green, red (wrapping); rotation changers add 90° clockwise, cycling 0°→90°→180°→270°→0°. A goal cell only activates when the piece's shape, color, and rotation exactly match its requirements. Stepping onto an activated goal completes it. The level is won when all goals are completed. The game provides feedback on 'blocked_directions' to prevent wasted moves into walls.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to complete all levels by navigating a grid and activating then stepping onto goal cells. Each goal cell requires your carried piece to have a specific shape, color, and rotation simultaneously. You must strategically use modifier tiles (shape, color, and rotation changers) to align your piece's attributes with each goal's requirements, then reach the goal cell before running out of stamina and lives.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The game operates on a grid with tile types: walls (impassable), floors (walkable), and special tiles (shape, color, rotation changers, stamina refills). Each move costs 1 stamina; when stamina reaches 0, a life is lost and stamina resets to its maximum. Losing all lives results in game over. Shape changers cycle the piece through shapes 0–5; color changers cycle through orange, blue, green, red (wrapping); rotation changers add 90° clockwise, cycling 0°→90°→180°→270°→0°. A goal cell only activates when the piece's shape, color, and rotation exactly match its requirements. Stepping onto an activated goal completes it. The level is won when all goals are completed. The game provides feedback on 'blocked_directions' to prevent wasted moves into walls.
